summary: Specialist 14 INTEGRATION & E2E AUDIT: 10 checks (1 CRITICAL FAIL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 4 PASS). FACTION-CONTENT-UNLOCK-CHECK FAIL: get_unlocked_content() defined in reputation_system.gd:103 but NEVER called in merlin_card_system.gd. Faction gate at rep>=50 completely unwired. 6 new tasks generated.

audit_checklist.name: BroceliandeForest3D inline encounters (EncounterCardOverlay)
audit_checklist.notes: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1057 overlay=EncounterCardOverlayScript.new(card) â€” inline card overlay active, no scene change needed

audit_checklist.name: Faction content gate (rep>=50) wired in card selection
audit_checklist.notes: MerlinReputationSystem.get_unlocked_content() (reputation_system.gd:103) is NEVER called in merlin_card_system.gd. generate_card()/get_fastroute_card() filter by biome+seen only, no faction rep check. FACTION_THRESHOLD_CONTENT=50 in merlin_constants.gd:1068 also unused for pool gating.

audit_checklist.name: GameFlowController wired in active game flow
audit_checklist.notes: GameFlowController exists (scripts/core/game_flow_controller.gd) with Hubâ†’Runâ†’EndScreen phases but NO scene instantiates it. Active path uses BroceliandeForest3D+HubAntre, not HubScreen+Run3D. Two incompatible hub paths coexist. Task E2E-DEAD-PATH-GAME-FLOW-CONTROLLER already tracks this.

audit_checklist.name: BroceliandeForest3D end-of-walk transition correct
audit_checklist.notes: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1221-1227 _on_hub(): routes to MerlinGame.tscn when _merlin_found, HubAntre.tscn otherwise. MerlinGame.tscn is the OLD card scene (merlin_game_controller.gd). If EncounterCardOverlay is the active path, MerlinGame route is an orphan path. Needs investigation.

audit_checklist.name: Director deletion order applied (IntroPersonalityQuiz+SceneRencontreMerlin)
audit_checklist.notes: q-20260414-005 answered 'Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Both .tscn files still exist. Task FLOW-INTROCALTOS-PERSONALITY-QUIZ-FIRST-RUN contradicts deletion decision (says 'route new profiles through quiz').

audit_checklist.name: ui_overlay_narrative return path
audit_checklist.notes: scripts/ui/ui_overlay_narrative.gd:291 navigates back to MenuPrincipal.tscn but Menu3DPC.tscn is the active 3D menu. Task FLOW-NARRATIVE-MENU-PATH-FIX already exists (pending).

test_task_detail.question: Does faction content unlock (rep>=50) gate special cards correctly?
evidence: merlin_reputation_system.gd:13 THRESHOLD_CONTENT=50.0 â€” gate threshold defined
merlin_reputation_system.gd:103 get_unlocked_content() â€” returns factions with rep>=50
merlin_constants.gd:1068 FACTION_THRESHOLD_CONTENT=50 â€” also defined here
merlin_card_system.gd:173-237 get_fastroute_card() â€” filters biome+seen only, NO faction rep check
merlin_card_system.gd:122 generate_card() â€” does NOT call get_unlocked_content()
grep result: get_unlocked_content never called outside reputation_system.gd
test_task_detail.impact: Players never see faction-specific special cards regardless of faction reputation. Rep system affects nothing in card pool.
test_task_detail.fix_required: Wire MerlinReputationSystem.get_unlocked_content(faction_rep) into generate_card()/get_fastroute_card() to boost/enable faction cards when rep>=50

also_completed.reason: Same finding as FACTION-CONTENT-UNLOCK-CHECK â€” both test the same gate, test run covers both
